name: zgeg-mapping
description: Application desktop locale ZgegMapping pour superposer et georeferencer des cartes scannees sur un fond OpenStreetMap.

scripts.dev: concurrently -k "vite --host 127.0.0.1" "tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json --watch" "wait-on tcp:5173 dist-electron/main.js && cross-env ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE= VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 electron ."
